final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer. When the select signal (s) is LOW, the output (mux_out) reflects the value of input b; when s is HIGH, mux_out reflects the value of input a.
module top_module(
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b,
  input s,
  output reg [3:0] mux_out
);always @(*) begin
    if (s == 1'b0) begin
      mux_out = a;
    end else begin
      mux_out = b;
    end
  end

endmodule
